svg.text: Relationship Safe Guide
One-page repo summary generated from code evidence only
FastAPI app with survey, payment, and premium report flows
What It Is

text.tspan: A FastAPI app that collects a free relationship-risk survey, computes
urgency and red flags, and serves a tokenized HTML report.
It also adds a paid premium flow with payment handling, deeper survey

svg.text: Who It's For

text.tspan: Primary persona: a user seeking safety-oriented guidance about
reconnecting or responding in an unstable relationship context.
This is inferred from survey fields, red-flag checks, and premium

svg.text: What It Does
Accepts a free survey, validates consent, and enforces required answer fields.
Scores impulse + red flags into LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, SOFT_GATE, or HARD_BLOCK.
Creates user sessions and report tokens, then serves a report URL for review.
Stores orders, paid survey answers, reports, and message schedules in the database.
Builds Inicis payment forms and handles return, failure, and virtual-bank notifications.
Checks paid access before accepting the premium survey or exposing premium status/report APIs.
Runs an interpretation pipeline, calls OpenAI, and renders premium markdown into HTML.
How To Run

text.tspan: Payment flow also uses INICIS_MID and INICIS_SIGN_KEY.
User setup docs / .env example: Not found in repo.

svg.text: How It Works

text.tspan: Components and data flow, based on repo evidence:

svg.text: Entrypoint: app/main.py creates the FastAPI app,
CORS config, SQLAlchemy tables, and an asyncpg pool on startup.
Persistence: app/db.py configures SQLAlchemy;
app/models.py defines UserSession, Order,
PaidSurvey, Report, and MessageSchedule.
Free flow: routes_survey.py validates survey input,
calls compute_risk(), stores session/report rows, and
returns a report URL.
Report serving: routes_report.py loads report + session
by token. If premium HTML exists and status is READY, it serves that;
otherwise it falls back to free report HTML from app/report.py.
Payments: routes_payments.py creates order ids,
signs requests, renders the Inicis payment page, verifies return data,
and updates order status.
Premium flow: routes_premium.py checks paid access,
saves paid survey answers, builds engine input, prepares prompts,
finalizes markdown/html, and stores the premium report in reports.
Services: app/services/interpretation computes structured
interpretation; premium_pipeline.py builds the prompt;
llm_client.py calls OpenAI; premium_renderer.py
turns markdown into HTML.
Evidence Notes

text.tspan: Used files: app/main.py, app/db.py, app/models.py, app/risk.py,
• Separate frontend app source or local UI startup instructions
Because of that, the run section uses the minimal command implied by the app entrypoint.
